one_line: Ran the REAL REx refine loop (gpt-5.5 via gateway; Anthropic credits exhausted) on the Cloudflare 2019-07-02 WAF-regex outage and wrote a grounded end-to-end case study: agent diagnosed the upstream waf-engine root at iter 0, avoided the loud edge-proxy scaling trap, fixed via rollback_deployment at iter 1 (resolved, clean win).
